name: The Jersey Way: Inside the Island's Scandals
original_name: The Jersey Way: Inside the Island's Scandals
overview: In the early 2000s, English policeman Graham Power manages to order a public inquiry on more than 50 years of heinous, hidden cases of child abuse. A handful of powerful men are quickly removed from their offices - or silenced. Troublesome witnesses are prevented from speaking. How deep does this go?
